← All charges

Fuchs Elephant Charge 2017

14 October 2017 · 📍 Luntente River

Results Checkpoints Awards Grants 🗺 Map

Conservation Grants

Funds distributed to conservation organisations from the 2017 charge.

Organisation Amount (ZMW) Purpose
Birdwatch Zambia 62,609 Support Conservation Education officer costs to work with schools and communities in IBAs.
Chipembele Wildlife Education Trust 67,600 Covering costs of logistics and materials for on site conservation education program
Conservation Lake Tanganyika 156,000 Support of a dedicated Community Coordinator, school conservation program with Chongololo Clubs, kids visits to Nsumbu Park
Conservation Lower Zambezi 67,600 Environmental Education Programme support
Conservation South Luangwa 67,600 Annual Conservation Fun Run & Sports Day, anti-snaring/patrols
Game Rangers International 67,600 Towards community conservation education, including popular local radio programs
Kasanka Trust 187,200 Support of Education & Community officer, school visits to park
Wildlife & Environmental Conservation Society of Zambia 312,000 Chongololo & Chipembele Clubs expand to over 1050
Zambian Carnivore Programme 67,600 Supporting Conservation Biologist Training, Conservation Clubs, de-snaring of carnivores
Total 1,055,809
Elephant Charge results archive — data updated annually after each event.
